name: openadviser
description: Open-source adviser bridge that lets local AI agents consult ChatGPT, Grok, and other web AI providers through a Chrome extension.

scripts.check: node --check src/background.js && node --check src/content/provider.js && node --check src/content/chatgpt-page.js && node --check src/content/grok-page.js && node --check bridge/server.js && node --check bridge/client.js && node --check skills/openadviser/scripts/openadviser.js
scripts.prepack: npm run check && npm run package:extension
